properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3 v3 v6 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a river of gladness That pours from Emmanuel's veins This sinner was plunged beneath the flood And got saved

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Since then I walk in forgiveness All of my guilt was erased The chains of the past Are broken at last I got saved Oh, I got saved

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm undone by the mercy of Jesus I'm undone by the goodness of the Lord I'm restored and made right He got a hold of my life I've got Jesus How could I want more

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've received nothing but goodness I've tested and tasted Your grace I was so lost 'Til I fell at the cross And got saved Oh, I got saved

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The love of God Gave me His pardon (gave me his pardon) The love of God Won't let me stay the same (oh, I'll never be the same) The love of God Pulls me up higher (higher) His will is stronger That's why I got saved (saved)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I've got Jesus How could I want more
